[{"Name":"Eoin Brennan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuU7yPDhqTm-J2ZD9jnjMTr8PkrfzMm_qakEf93l7W7DPjEGB8pw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top quality craftsmanship by an friendly and competent team.

The affect a new roof has on the curb appeal of your house is enormous, not to mention the comfort you gain knowing that everything is watertight for the oncoming winter - you need the installation done right.   Doug, Rada and team were awesome from beginning to end - from clear details of what was being installed in the quote to how they protected the rest of the house and deck during demolition and installation - they went the extra mile.

They easily dealt with some curveballs we threw to them too. They removed our leaky (and now unused) chimneys above the roofline, giving the home a much cleaner look and installed snow guards.

Doug took time to work through a water egress issue that was not related to the roof installation - including helping me cut drywall open! - determined to find a solution the issue. Which we did.
We also required some more specialized carpentry work. Doug leveraged his own network to get us somebody to complete it.

It's not easy to find a company that that you can trust with such competitive pricing and such high quality craftsmanship on such a project. I feel fortunate to have worked with Doug, Rada and the team at Eco Exteriors.

The metal roof has really given the home a transformative look. And the new gutters were really the cherry on top. My photographs attached don't truly show how transformative it is.

A great team and great company!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxspgriABMH3NDDwk-qvIV&fid=0x0:0x7b7cd1189f5accac"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"James Troutman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHJ3OXj5p6JZGAFkgYc6VJa_mmbbj0UHVtGNFtmstHXCIXyg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having had Eco Exteriors Roofing and Solar complete a few of my projects i am happy to recommend them to others. The team was knowledgeable, courteous and committed to doing the job right. I highly recommend Eco for anyone looking for a top tier roofing service.

James","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Antifave","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLA1YRTarlIhUqrQcYkecfXV-vKf4vF_GFst8_oK_RSsOIl3A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Contacted Eco Exteriors for a quote, Doug the owner was super pleasant to work with, offered quick service and I felt really confident going into the job based on his extensive knowledge and solid team.

1.  If I was told this, I would have looked at the weather before making the appointment.  2.  I called two other roofing companies and both showed up had no problem going on the roof in the rain.

He gets two stars because he actually called to cancel. It’s been a pleasure working with Lockhart Roofing Ltd, and we would definitely recommend them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpxoD34gJyd0eg0N5Pi7mD&fid=0x0:0x6bf9c316751f10d1"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Bruce McIntyre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMH4PjJWL0fOpgAzYsdjzCXImxKj4YJcGNIWb9Qhw8vfA3VA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Scotty and his crew did an excellent job replacing our roof. They are very professional, good communicators, organized, detail-oriented and did a good job of cleaning the site each day.  Our new roof looks great!
We highly recommend Lockhart roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLpNbwkwE&fid=0x0:0x6bf9c316751f10d1"],"When":"2024-6-25"},{"Name":"Timothy Paterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_hTZtO3XH86pUcjYex91dcXWfHfgORZAeGGSmHSxvhEI1OyQQ5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 Star service is the first thought that comes to mind in regards to my experience with choosing Lockhart Roofing to re-shingle my mother’s roof.

From the first call with Scotty when the roof had started to leak, Scotty was here the following morning as arranged and on time. He placed a tarp over the affected area, walked and measured the roof and advised me of the options.
After deciding on re-shingling the entire roof I asked Scotty to prepare a quote and that I have 3 other contractors coming to prepare quotes.

Once receiving all the quotes it was decided to have Lockhart Roofing carry out the work as even though 3 of the 4 quotes were in the same ballpark I could tell Scotty was professional, approachable and very knowledgeable in his trade.

The work was carried out over a few days due to weather windows by Scotty and his crew who were very polite and hard working. They kept the property very tidy at the end of each day including checking for stray nails from the removal of the older shingles.
The crew always turned up on time and left the roof watertight at the end of each day advising of the next steps.

Since the work has been completed there have been several homeowners and contractors commenting on how good a job was done and asking for their details.

If you are looking for a contractor to work on your homes roof, I highly recommend contacting Lockhart Roofing.

Thank you Scotty and the boys🔨🔨🔨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD-dWv4QE&fid=0x0:0x6bf9c316751f10d1"],"When":"2024-4-11"},{"Name":"Jorge Castelan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWam-ysbAcXy4bj2LE2Mg6QX0w5mnYcUqyQtBATlffP5rrMBuue=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After an extensive search and multiple quotes (6), we ultimately chose Lockhart Roofing to redo our roof—and we’re very glad we did. There were several factors that set them apart: their clear professionalism, the great value for the quality of work/materials, and their honest, no-pressure approach. Unlike another top-rated company that tried to create urgency by exaggerating and emphasizing potential damage, Lockhart Roofing focused on facts and transparency.

The job itself was completed efficiently and on schedule. Scotty and his entire crew were professional, respectful, and a pleasure to work with from start to finish. The results speak for themselves—the new roof looks fantastic—and both the pre- and post-installation customer care have been excellent.

We’re extremely happy with the entire experience and would absolutely recommend Lockhart Roofing to anyone looking for top-notch roofing work done the right way.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brian Mangal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIEu0sUcaZwF1a3zzyTwkJTncPrkkRYqixc29_LCmei59-Liw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had Lockhart Roofing convert our old cedar roof to a new rubberized asphalt roof, and I couldn’t be more impressed with the entire process. Scotty was incredibly responsive to all my questions and worked closely with me to schedule the job during ideal weather conditions. He clearly walked me through every step of the project, ensuring I understood what to expect.

The team completed the job on time, as promised, with no issues, and the new roof looks fantastic! Scotty and his crew were professional, efficient, and made sure to clean up the site daily, leaving everything spotless. The quality of work is top-notch, and I now have peace of mind with my new roof. I would not hesitate to recommend Lockhart Roofing to anyone in need of roofing services. They were an absolute pleasure to work with!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anil Sethy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbBPcJHW18EtVDIx67W1g4x88J83tAtm8Cx3VRUvflVVPX0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Scotty and his crew replaced our cedar roof with an architectural shingle roof in September 2024. We live in Furry Creek, BC. Right from the material selection to the roof replacement Scotty managed the whole project impeccably. Inspite of occasional  inclement weather they stayed with the project and completed the work to our satisfaction. Special mention also goes to Paul, the head roofer, whose dedication was amazing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yourim Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLswosHLkAqvTzyE6Z_1KsS2hPmdW4QSJ-FFrz0QJ04obq5PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lockhart Roofing Company was the best!

Scott and his crew members were very professional and cared a lot about the house and roof.

Always on time. I never had a single argument with them. Worked hard with safety precautions.

Whenever they were done for the day, they made sure there were no masses on the roof or ground. It was always clean in my front and backyard.

They were very knowledgeable about the roof and guided us to choose the best roofing materials for the house.

Super highly recommend! No regrets about choosing Lockhart roofing company.

Again, thank you, Scott and Lockhart crew members, for the hard work.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Adam Scheuer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK99ztuBsEUp8ZF7euiqcwM44mSOT-lQJEKN1rgWjFlg7yeAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’re about 6 months after install of our new Ecoroof. We replaced an old cedar roof and I’m thrilled with the results. We wanted to keep the cedar “look” and styling, but with something more robust and easy to clean. 10/10 results. Coming to an end of the first winter with it and it has relieved so much stress. The old cedar roof took me days of back breaking labour to clean (we have two massive trees that drop debris onto our roof), while this roof sheds debris so easily. 3 days is now down to a quick 20 min job with a leaf blower.
The roof looks fantastic and many neighbours have commented on how good it looks!
Penfolds was very easy to deal with - good communication, punctual, hardworking crew, and a good clean-up. I’d happily recommend them and use them again. They made what is a stressful purchase into a smooth process.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSWveBtTCqbs7Ucd-CWzYv&fid=0x0:0xa8ff280fa8553f49"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Stavros Kotsireas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB1-xXF2j4acU3aQ05cJSgq7bKb1N1q8OugpSd8_bbpALIUbPG=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We usually only sit down to write a review when something goes wrong… but this experience was the complete opposite. I called 3 different companies to get a quote and I quickly settled with this one. When I first met John and Paul, I immediately felt at ease with them; we went up on the roof and they inspected all areas (including the gutters) and they took proper measurements in order to provide an accurate quote and not just something pulled out of a hat. This includes when he finds mistakes by other contractors (which he often fixes and doesn't charge for!).  Reg has taken on a number of projects for me including cutting back a roof line; installing new fascia boards; rebuilding a brick chimney (both above the roof and in the attic); installing liners for new tankless water heaters; and repairing holes in a chimney and wall from the replacement of water heaters.  Every one of these jobs was done to a high quality and Reg walked me through what he was doing and why at each step.  His prices are more than fair--when I first started with Reg it seemed like he was charging slightly more than others, but I quickly learned that this is because he is upfront about costs and doesn't trick you with hidden costs later, his work is more complete than others so he does the full job at high quality, and he doesn't leave you with loose ends or a partially finished job.  Having now worked with a bunch of contractors on my house, Reg's work is by far the best value I have seen.  Where other contractors try to minimize their time on site so they can move on to the next job, Reg will spend an extra day or two (without charge) to do things right.  More than anything, he is an honest and decent guy that I trust to do good work. [{"Name":"Joe Yeung Wai Chui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_KRunk9AiLiL1s3eFVboH0veN8HcPHzhwWlZLgx_zthUfDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was approached by Griffin as a walk by a few months back, I’ve been thinking of updating my roof around the time, so it was perfect opportunity to get a quote from him, in turn he was very knowledgeable and up front, no hidden cost, plus he can guide u to a finance company with low interest if u can’t pay it all at once (we end up didn’t need it, but it was a good option to have)

We scheduled a date, but when it got close the weather wasn’t very stable he was willing to rescheduled to tend to my concern, which I was very appreciated and finally when May comes weather seen to be mush better and we are ready! But he had to push us back a couple of days, which in turn I totally understood.
Anyway, the big dumpster got dropped off, the guy was very nice and gentle that he put wood plank underneath it so it wouldn’t mark my driveway, and the undoing of my old roof began!!! The guys was very efficient and careful, they even got the water barrier down the first day, second day was a little slow, but they did manage to get more than half done and most of the vents changed, third day was finishing up the shingles and clean up most of the big debris around the house.
On the fourth day it was the new gutters, they did take some time, but it was done just as the sun went down(without the down pipes)
Finally on the fifth day, all the down pipes are connected a little touch up here and there, with the garbage bin hauled away and Griffin did a walk around on the roof with me!

My final thoughts, their installation was very nice, all the flashing and end piece was well placed, exposed nails(for the vents) was sealed with sealer/silicone, my only little little feed back to Griffin was about the final clean up(because that was the sales pitch that got me to go with him) might need a little bit effort, but all in all I am very happy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKn7yO-f2qyizgE&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Amandah Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7vj6hIs1gDSgBT53rsY2onXYmJBGVm8ShVulIHTRFAWWJkF8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rydel did an incredible job putting the Christmas light on our house! He gave me a quote, came back as agreed. The roof was fixed, flattened and new drain was added. I am happy with the work and the cost was reasonable. They fixed what was needed and it was done in a timely manner. I will be looking for them to do regular inspections in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ming Soo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzaIrU_br8_HyZdTNVVMSGS1KvPF83kuRUSm8G0eyjyBPj-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"About one year ago, GVRD replaced my house’s touch-on roof which is still under a 12-year warranty. In late October (2018), a piece of fascia board around the chimney fell off from the roof. I called Chris, the owner of GVRD Roofing, with my cellphone a couple times but no call was returned. Then I sent him a couple of SMSs and followed up with an email with a picture of the fallen fascia board a week later, and again there was no reply from him. I then called him from my land phone with its number blocked at the receiving end, and this time Chris answered my call and thought I was a new customer. I told him the problem, and he said that he would send someone to fix it next Monday.
I sent him a reminder in the following Monday morning. I waited all day but no one from GVRD showed up. Due to the heavy raining was coming next day, I had to use whatever glue I have in my garage to attach the fallen fascia board back to the roof in that late afternoon. Afterward, I asked him to send someone to examine/fix the problem properly a few times, and finally he sent me a message that he would send someone to fix the problem. However, no one showed up again.
I sent the last request to Chris on February 1st, 2019 and mentioned that if he doesn’t send his guy to fix the problem, I will write a review about this complain. No message returned from him before I post this review.
If he doesn’t want to fix something broken within a year, what is a 12-year warranty for?

(18 Mar 2019) Comments on Chris' response:

1. I received no message from you either from my answering machine, SMS or email. Shouldn't you let me know which date and what time your team member came when I was not home?

2. In a professional manner, isn't it a courtesy to inform your customer before going to his house so he will be there to wait for you?

3. Is this the way you deal with your customers for warranty/after-service works by communicating through Google Reviews?

4. Because the sheet metal was not done properly the first time, that was why it fell down. Under warranty, it should be repaired in the way you installed it before and you should not charge for the repair. Period.

(24 April 2019) Two weeks ago, finally someone from GVRD came to resolve the problem. The roofer spent about 5 minutes to inspect the problem and applied proper sealant along the gap between the chimney and the sheet metal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC49Zqpbg&fid=0x0:0x89aefde1fa01e25b"],"When":"2019-2-19"},{"Name":"Audrey Ple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn2viesIOzi9dZ9nbe1o9PIANNzO6j3rX9MsPlM8PokqyCmzh7aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"2022: When I noticed a leak in my bedroom, I contact many roofers. Most did not get back to me. A few told me they were so busy, they had to turn customers away. GVRD Roofing stayed in touch with me and sent Marcos as soon as he had a spare moment. The repair took only 10 minutes, but I am so grateful to have it done. Marcos also said if I have any further problems, to just let him know. It was an overall excellent experience given the very difficult time we are having in BC right now with excessive rain and storms. I recommend GVRD Roofing Inc and thank the team for taking care of my roof.

2024: Because of the great service I got in 2022, when my roof leaked again this year, I contacted GVRD. Another amazing job. Roof leak is repaired and at the same time, the team replaced some broken vent and plumbing stacks and cleaned the moss from the roof for a very fair price. I hope my roof will hold out for another ten years. Thank you. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing Inc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Erickson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpptr7nPYPPFk51OnQLvxP70onhM272AbvQ9GITiFEUAPoY5NtAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Called them to repair an emergency leak in the upstairs bathroom roof. I explained the situation and was quoted 'a couple hundred'.  They sent someone over within a couple hours (this was the weekend too, I was impressed).

The guy came, took a look, found the hole in the roof (and 2 others), and told me he could seal them. I asked if he could also tarp one of the areas as well. He said he could, though he didn't think it was necessary. I asked him what the cost would be, and he said '5 or 6 hundred, though I'm not really the pricing guy so I don't know'. I mentioned the original guy we spoke to thought it would be a couple hundred but the guy on-site explained since it's more work than they thought so it would be more.

I agreed, and he did the work (and covered one of the areas with a tarp I bought). He left after less than 2 hours.

The next day I got an invoice for $1200, with no line items for what labour cost, materials, anything. Just $1200 and a couple lines of descriptors.

I called to ask about the massive discrepancy and he said 'oh, that what the on-site guy said to charge... I guess I'll talk to him again' which didn't instill confidence in me. He sent a revised invoice for $750 a little later.

I'm glad it's not $1200 but I would encourage anyone working with GVRD Roofing to get a quote in writing, and also sign off on work to be done with a quoted amount.

To be clear, the roofing work seems fine (and I'm glad they were able to come so quickly), it's just the quoting and invoicing that I have a problem with. Paying 3.5 times the amount quoted over the phone, and still more than the on-site guy's estimate doesn't feel great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"KS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtKmg2d7VY1fg4qgOYMXm8c1Sm9A2nK6P09OWCMjWauDiPSbQxag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a missing vent cap cover on my roof that needed to be installed ASAP. Called them on a Sat, Dan showed up at the time he said he would Sunday morning. However I had not received a quote so there was some back and forth with Dan and his boss - they ended up quoting me something competitive to another quote I had received so I went ahead with having Dan proceed to add a new vent cap cover. While on the roof Dan identified my deteriorating roof caps and suggested I replace them soon to make the roof last longer. As well he helped me secure down other vent caps to avoid having them get dislodged. Overall Dan was professional and a good communicator.  There was some mix up with the invoice afterwards with his boss Chris but it was quickly resolved and I am happy with their help last minute on a weekend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Athena Affan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjXsPuRi1sb0jy0PJsygOjvpMXmO2J_yu4Flo3mbsnahkLGFS2Hg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you so much Chris for helping us address a persistent leak! GVRD Roofing was quick to respond to my call and got someone out to take a look and assess the problem the same day. They sent us pictures showing where they felt the issue was and communicated the work that they anticipated needed to be done. They did a quick fix right away to stop the leak with a plan to come back to do a more fullsome repair later.

When the fix wasn't sufficient, I called Chris who sent his team back to take another look and complete the work.  Initially we were not satisfied with the work that was done, because the issue was not resolved. I got in touch with Chris who took our concernse seriously and sent his team out one last time with really experienced roofers, and the assurance that they'd do the absolute best they could. It paid off, and now - no more leak!

Chris is dedicated to providing quality work, and is flexible and easy to work with. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing for fast and reliable roofing needs.

Thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Burrowes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQDp0weGABv_yTyNgbFKVXRyWEQOVpweKl531fnrSrhQGbEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GVRD Roofing did a great job on our commercial building. I am planning on doing more work in our home and will certainly hire them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grant Arnold","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUP2lLBhm9OUYNC6j9Kr6bV1A-0zWEFW4Q4uskp92S-mnp7Ajg9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Revelbuilt to build a new garage on our property replacing a very old one. I will definitely be using them for any future home renovation needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Westerhof","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0owKS-sJvZSgNGVLTxL5Y2JcYzaJO3vEsxtboHiCz4WENuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our kitchen was 39 years old and beside a sunken family room.   The space felt dated, cramped and awkward to work in.   We decided to renovate and got quotes from various companies including Revel Built, whom we had heard of through a family member.  We weren’t sure of what we wanted and they helped us explore various options and the associated costs.     Brad was the main contact and impressed us with his knowledge and patience.
We eventually decided to completely renovate the kitchen and family room,  including raising the sunken floor and replacing the fireplace.   The price was competitive and fair.   The  work started on the promised date and stayed very close to schedule and budget.    All the trades and people involved were very professional, friendly and courteous.    We were very happy with the quality of the work and any minor issues were quickly resolved.
Our new kitchen and family room looks great, feels much bigger and is way more functional.  We  highly recommend the Revel team.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Dry Land Restoration Vancouver
address: 1641 Lonsdale Ave #733, North Vancouver, BC V7M 2J5
open_hours: {"Friday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Monday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Saturday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Sunday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Thursday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Tuesday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."],"Wednesday":["8 a.m.–5 p.m."]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Linda Folster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeZjMCoyL1VQd4-J9JZiT0WsLvgKktuhLdZlO7DYLLj4WCUyQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Where do I begin? Dean Bennett is my hero! He restored my mould-ridden, water damaged suite back safety and it has never looked more beautiful; plus, he provided me with unwavering support and expert guidance at navigating my insurance claim to get a fair settlement - more than 3 x their first offer.

Read on if you want the details. This is a long story that started out as an extended nightmare and concluded as a happy ending 9 months later, thanks to Dean! It is a story about water damage, mould, stress, and hope. I own my home and live upstairs, with a rental suite downstairs. My tenants informed me that the hardwood floor in the hallway was severely buckling, sending me pictures of a situation that had been building for weeks and months, unbeknownst to me. It turns out that my heat pump in the downstairs utility room had been leaking all summer while we were using the central air.

I contacted my insurance company right away, and things went from bad to worse, as they sent over their “preferred contractor” (i.e., scammer and co-conspirator) to assess and estimate the cost to repair the water damage and remediate the mould. I was naïve and trusting, not realizing that insurance companies have their own interests at heart and not the insured – in other words, providing low-ball settlement offers and assigning unethical contractors to do marginal work instead of a thorough and safe repair. Days turned into weeks, which turned into months, as the insurance company employed their stalling tactics to make it look like I was holding up the repairs (which can ultimately be a rationale for denying an insurance claim altogether). I finally decided to take matters into my own hands and hired BC Mould Inspections to assess my case and make recommendations, because I did not trust my insurance company to hire a reliable contractor who would do a safe and thorough job of mould abatement. I asked BC Mould Inspectors to recommend mould remediation experts, and they suggested Dean Bennett, who came with them while they inspected.

Dean explained that these types of claims are Dryland’s niche, and he offered to be available to answer any questions I might have. I immediately sensed his sincerity and expertise and decided to hire him to remediate the mould. Over the next several weeks, I had many questions about not only the mould, but also navigating water damage claims, and turned to Dean. He was always very responsive, which was refreshing, considering that I had largely been ignored by my insurance company for months. He educated me about the unethical tactics of insurance companies and let me know that his company also does full scope construction projects and that homeowners have the right to choose their own contractor (which I did not know). It was an easy, immediate decision to fire the other contractor and hire Dean. This gave me more hope than I’d had in several months because I finally found someone who is competent – someone who actually cares – someone I can trust.

Dean is selective and hires top-notch subcontractors who are highly skilled and care about doing good work. He not only delivered on all his promises, but he also exceeded my expectations by surprising me with extra touches along the way, treating me like GOLD as his customer, and being a supportive sounding board/ally while I navigated one of the most stressful experiences in my life. He really is an exceptional, integrous person. I cannot recommend Dean and Dryland Restoration enough. I feel so indebted to Dean. If I could, I would rate Dryland Restoration 10/5. They’ve earned it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gemma Rex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeQIekcTb5rUyTsSgGqsd_cB94SV5HukQT8wzijShbyhD8gITw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":""Just send photos" is not an inspection method. We needed an in-person inspection of the space, followed by a written report, but were repeatedly told to send photos. Didn't receive a reply when the photos were sent.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I was a little nervous as this was the first major update I have done on my home and I was worried it would be complicated and disruptive. But I was pleasantly surprised how easy and quick the process was. David was professional, efficient and quick to respond to my messages and provided excellent communication throughout the job. The bulk of the work was done in just 2 days and I am very happy with the final results. Thank you again to the team that worked on my home!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcrsq_mQ-4YtFYRLC17ulb&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Isamu Fujiwara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_4Og65TP38R2TPhUnlx88HafR78I2GSmw-C7FC7jNI1qSPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently noticed a bulge on my ceiling that looked like possible water damage and was worried there might be a roof leak. I called to request an inspection of both the roof and attic, and from the very first interaction, the experience was excellent. The person who answered the phone was friendly, listened carefully to my concerns, and was able to schedule an appointment the very same day. I also appreciated receiving an upfront estimate before any work began.

Will and his assistant arrived right on time and were both professional and courteous. They took great care inside the house, making sure carpets stayed clean and placing rags before entering the attic. They thoroughly inspected the attic, took photos, and clearly explained their findings. Thankfully, there was no issue with the roof, which was very reassuring.

What really impressed me was that they went above and beyond the scope of the roof inspection. Instead of stopping there, they investigated further and discovered the true source of the moisture — an HVAC pipe that wasn’t properly sealed to the diffuser. They could have simply said the roof was fine and left it at that, but they took the extra step to find the real cause.

I was extremely impressed with their honesty, professionalism, and attention to detail. Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Wallace MacKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi0gLdsP6SQdWEGFytwUu-l4jWVL0gsHnGlVFQdkMDMolU8T34=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kizi Melo (an Absolute Roof Solutions technican) restored 2 decks, both getting older and weathered, in our Kitsilano duplex. She provided excellent service, very competent workmanship, detailed in ensuring that all torchon membranes were fully restored. The decks look new again, and I'll sleep better knowing the roof decks are well maintained.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC14fI5SrxId2YjDGhINnyw&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Michael L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWmVa5clHn0Ehod5yiVD866mCxGgm6tp-oWguDG5g7OzGJAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During solar panel installation, the technician advised the plywood was very wet along one side of the roof.  The roof was only 12 yrs old.  They took and provided photos.  The solar panel installation was halted. I contacted several roofing companies to get assessments on the issue and obtain estimates.  It turns out one side of the roof did not have adequate venting and moisture was being absorbed by the plywood.  I met with several roofing company representatives and each provided their suggested way to address the issue...and the estimated costs were all over the map. But when I met with the Absolute Roof Solutions sales representative...I knew I had found the right company.  They explained what the issue was, how they would address it and the next steps.  They followed with a quote and then a follow up conversation with the Project Manager.  They picked a date that was to be rain free.  The crew showed up on time and they went about their work.  Taking 1/2 a roof is not an easy task but they managed to get it done in the one day...and to get the site all cleaned after, including ensuring all debris was removed from both neighbours yards.  Great job Absolute Roof Solutions.  It was a very positive roof repair/replacement experience and very happy to recommend Absolute Roof Solutions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clayton Gates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo34GpVM8Q-hHRq1VIZ2mXz-vYQxCuXxrC9vO7avwfCDq-dDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After contacting several companies to quote on a new roof for my families first house in Vancouver we decided to go with Absolute. No surprises would come up during the project and we would be extremely happy with the final product. I didn’t want to take a chance on my first home and they were by far the most professional quote we received and didn’t want to take chances with a cheaper “new roof for $xx quote, unsure of what a “new roof” meant to this company vs our expectations. Will update when project is complete","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Uma Yogendrakumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfitmQGgemb1Ff97hTdcn0n6ocIFc3rQ_TE2y8b0rrtoC7SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our roof was replaced last week. Thank you Dan for your great service:) I will definitely use Red Seal for that service again as well as any HVAC work I'll need in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Roy W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbhvREOIyHu7XuP1fsavEb1q07SoEEtuG-GyZAH5XzhNkJ3NWamQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Impeccable timing! All my questions and concerns were addressed. Communication was quick and professional. Scheduling was easy and within days, his crew was on site and ready to go, rain or shine. Dan’s crew were great…professional, punctual and courteous. I was regularly updated on their progress and the state of the chimney. They confirmed that bricks were loose and ready to fail. Quality of work is tremendous: chimney repaired, looking solid and new. Roof and yard was cleared of all debris. I received great value and peace-of-mind that my home is safe. Roy W.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChntnqzwE&fid=0x0:0xae7636f5cb8e0e9"],"When":"2023-2-13"},{"Name":"Scott Orth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0DFKlVkUPhZNryUgeQZkUtqXSB2qO3jh_4ds-2bQcsXQnmv87=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very responsive. Professional. Excellent quality. And able to take care of a very challenging problem quickly.

We had to turn off our hot water heater on a Thursday due to squirrels getting in the chimney and filling the exhaust vent with leaves, making it unsafe to use. Yes, squirrels in a chimney is a thing. Going without hot water is a huge inconvenience.

I called multiple contractors and most didn't want to take on the job at all, or said it would be a couple of weeks. I called Red Seal Fireplace, spoke to Dan the owner, he said his guys were busy but he could come the next day to assess things.

Dan came the next day, provided a fair quote, and started the work himself on Monday. The project turned out to be much more challenging and difficult than expected - but Dan was highly determined and committed to getting it done. The work was hard and the conditions were very hot - but he got it done.

Very grateful for the responsiveness, professionalism, and determined work ethic to help get hot water back on as quickly as possible. I absolutely recommend Red Seal Fireplace to anyone needing chimney or HVAC work.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Our decision was based on the positive Google reviews, The Best of Burnaby Awards, A+ BBB rating, and competitive price.  Our first point of contact was with Garrett.  He provided a thorough walk through and explained the scope of work required.  By the end of the day, I had a copy of a very detailed quote that included the scope of work to be done, including all the details of the type of shingles to be applied, vents, flashing, finishes, warranty, etc…

The start of the job was delayed by a few weeks due to rain.  The crew arrived at 7am on the day the job started.  They laid out tarps around the perimeter of the property to protect the plants and walkway.  By noon, the entire roof had been stripped off and they started applying new plywood.  There was a threat of rain that evening so they knew they had to have the roof waterproofed before they left that day.  The crew was fast and efficient and put in a long 12 hour day.  They made sure to leave the yard clean and free of debris before they left for the day.

On Day 2 we met with Arnell and project manager Franscisco.  They went over the progress and addressed any concerns that we had.  As a contractor myself, I was very impressed with the quality of work and attention to detail that the crew took.  Every row of shingles were perfectly straight and they chalk lined all the valleys and cap shingles.  They even installed rain diverters at all the edges to direct the rain towards the gutters.  They took the extra step of respraying the furnace vent and chimney flashing.  You could tell the crew took pride in their work.

After everything was completed on the roof, the crew cleaned the entire perimeter of the house.  They blew out all the gutters and picked up every last bit of debris from the flower beds.  Before they left, they used a magnet roller to pickup any nails from the driveway.  I cannot say enough about the professionalism of the crew and the quality of their work.  The project manager Franscisco came by to do a final walkthrough to ensure that everything was completed, and to our satisfaction, before accepting our final payment.  If you need your roof redone, I highly recommend Canuck Roofing.  Excellent job!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcUdcd3VMLfhSRMQkE47ZP&fid=0x0:0xd33de2d70a59d9b2"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Min-Jee Mowat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8uCA1U3usW8xUu0mhvaDVOx-f71LysE8W5-YPMoH6nVtUsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was able to communicate and dispatch a crew to us within less than an hour of finding a huge hole in our roof. He spoke to me in a condescending manner, as if he thought he was much smarter than me. I gave him my measurements in centimeters, and he rudely told me they only work in feet, despite Canada officially using the metric system.

On top of that, his attitude felt somewhat discriminatory. I got the impression that he treated me this way because I don’t "look Canadian," which made the experience even worse. His behavior was unprofessional, and it felt like he didn’t care to help at all.

[{"Name":"Mahmood Ebadian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7RUfhQgf4rZMMdhtAWxXKcvxkM0pPcRRoF02V1wDskOhg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We worked with Arani Construction on a full garden-level renovation of our home on Berkley Avenue in the District of North Vancouver, and we are very happy with how everything turned out.

This was a substantial residential renovation that included a complete kitchen remodel, two bathroom renovations, living room updates, new flooring throughout, fireplace improvements, and a new fire-rated ceiling assembly. We also upgraded the electrical service and made important layout changes to create a more open and functional space.

Structural work was a major part of the project. New engineered beams were installed to support the layout modifications, and Arani restored our previously enclosed garage back to its original configuration with new posts, beam installation, new foundations, and a new garage door. All of the work was completed under a District of North Vancouver permit, with proper engineering design and inspection coordination.
Pedram and his team were organized, communicative, and professional throughout the process. They handled the structural and permit requirements carefully, and we felt confident in their experience as a general contractor in North Vancouver.
We would not hesitate to recommend Arani Construction to anyone planning a home renovation in the North Shore area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA47sgyjJusw9RBStTH-6gH&fid=0x0:0x52689e1b2190f21e"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Fatemeh Ahmadvand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV15HOE1Of6MNvA2Dsb1pPb0w05z1G14eafKAtzFOXn12esatE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had opportunity to have Arani service of construction,, several times.
The last one was an addition and a major upgrade, construction in West Vancouver.

EXCELLENT SERVICE. GREAT PRICES. These three words sum up my experience at Minit-Tune & Break on 15th street in North Vancouver. As a woman who just moved from Alberta, I was looking for a reliable and trustworthy mechanic. You see, in order to pass my inspection to obtain a BC license, I already had to replace my windshield (in Alberta, we drive with cracks and chips in our windshields all year round!) Then right after I spent almost $500 to do that, I started to hear a grinding noise coming from the back!! Needless to say, I was really nervous about what I had to fix, and how much it was going to cost. So I started googling and found some amazing reviews about Amyn who is the manager at Minit-Tune & Brake Auto Centre. I called and he answered the phone! He spent a considerable amount of time discussing the potential issues with me and explaining the different options and pricing. He was so transparent and informative, I felt respected and reassured that I was in the right hands. They replaced my brakes and pads under 5 hours. When I went to pick up my car, he showed me the old parts and how worn they were. Not safe!! The price was under the other quotes and I also got $100 off which really helped!
